reference: I have a bone-like lump below my right kneecap. It is extremely painful to touch. I have had it for what I believe is over a year. Previously, it would have to have been hit hard to hurt badly, but now it is much easier to aggravate. Several times I played a contact sport and was hit there, and I could not walk for a while. What could this be?
text: I have a lump below my right kneecap; it is extremely painful to touch. I have had it for what is over a year. Previously, it would have to have been hit hard to hurt badly, but now it is much easier to aggravate. Several times I have hit a contact sport and was hit there, and I could not walk for a while. What could this be?
